no.name: Samira
no.review: Hyggelig personale, utmerket kvalitet. Anbefales på det sterkeste.

no.name: Alexander
no.review: God mat, store porsjoner, veldig god service 👌

no.name: MarieogJohn
no.review: Var her for første gang idag og smakte på verdens beste wrap😍 Nyyyydelig mat og koselig plass😀

no.name: Nicklas
no.review: Hyggelig og god service👍

no.name: Hans
no.review: Kjempegod mat og fantastisk hyggelig eier! Anbefales☀️

no.name: Pål
no.review: God smakende mat og rask levering

no.name: Wenche
no.review: Helt sykt god mat og fantastisk service. Anbefales på det høyeste 😊

no.name: Farshad
no.review: God og smaksfulle opplevelse 👍🏼😋 Anbefales sterkt 👌👌

no.name: Ragnhild
no.review: Verdens beste wraps👏🏻👏🏻🌸! Jeg er rett og slett avhengig! Fantastisk service!

no.name: Filip
no.review: Veldig gode wraps og kaffe ☺️

no.name: Ava
no.review: Alltid god mat, kaffe og fantastisk vertskap 👌🏼🤤

no.name: Soheila
no.review: Det var den beste wraps, coffee og smoothien jeg har smakt👍👌🏻

no.name: Asma
no.review: Fantastisk mat og verdens BESTE service🌟

no.name: Julie
no.review: Veldig god mat og drikke 😍

no.name: Christina
no.review: Rene og fine lokaler. Super hyggelig og imøtekommende personale. Fantastisk god mat, spesielt wrappen med chicken tandoori🤤 Anbefales på det varmeste❤️

no.name: Benedicte
no.review: God mat og kaffe. Hyggelig service og fint lokale.

no.name: Katrine
no.review: Gode wraps! Burritos del cielo!

no.name: Monica
no.review: God kaffe, og helt fantastisk service. En hyggelig start på dagen før jeg skulle på kurs. Anbefales!

no.name: Johnny
no.review: Nylig oppdaget dette stedet. Alt vi har prøvd til lunsj har vært topp. Hadde med en italiensk kunde, og til og med han skrøt av pizzaen. Wraps og tunfisksalaten anbefales også.

no.name: Håvard
no.review: Stoppet her på trilleturen da minstemann sovnet. Nydelig fersk wrap laget ved bestilling, og god smoothie. Plass både i sol og skygge, og en liten lekeplass like ved for barna.

no.name: Solmaz
no.review: Jeg hadde en fantastisk opplevelse med en veldig god burger og utmerket service! Burgeren var saftig, smakfull og perfekt stekt, og personalet var vennlig, oppmerksomt og imøtekommende. Anbefales!

no.name: Nora
no.review: Vi nyter en veldig god drink etter å ha spist en veldig god pizza her. Maten, servicen og stemningen er virkelig på topp – et rolig sted med serviceinnstilt personale som har kunden i fokus.

no.name: Sima
no.review: Fantastisk mat og utmerket service! 🌟 Maten var helt nydelig – smakfull, fersk og perfekt tilberedt, og personalet var vennlig, hjelpsomt og fikk oss til å føle oss velkomne. Anbefales på det sterkeste! 🍽️✨

no.name: Lil P
no.review: Jobber rett ved siden av, og kommer hit når jeg vil ha en digg lunsj 😋 Veldig gode burritos og baguetter – favoritten må være Tandoori-fyllet🌯 Alltid blid og hyggelig betjening. Kan anbefales👍

no.name: Gunhild
no.review: Kommer tilbake hit! Hyggelig atmosfære.

no.name: Erika
no.review: Fint lunsjsted, god mat, alltid hyggelig betjening.

no.name: Anders Lindsetmo
no.review: Utrolig bra baguetter og ufattelig hyggelig personale.

no.name: Hege
no.review: Fantastisk hyggelig sted med Soheila i spissen. Finner ikke en mer serviceinnstilt og hyggelig dame. Alt på menyen er godt, så det er bare å prøve seg fram :-)

no.name: Alexander De Luca
no.review: Veldig bra mat, store porsjoner, kjapp og god service.

no.name: Emma
no.review: Helt fantastisk service – stedet var egentlig stengt, men den hyggelige eieren åpnet opp og lagde wraps til oss likevel. Reddet kvelden vår! Tusen takk for fantastisk service.

no.name: Roya
no.review: Veldig fint og behagelig sted. Fantastisk god service, bedre kunne det ikke bli.

no.name: Selda
no.review: Vært her to ganger: bestilte en kyllingwrap og senere en kyllingsalat. Så godt, og utrolig koselige folk som jobber her. Gleder meg til neste lunsjpause!

no.name: Julia
no.review: Smakfull mat, god pris, veldig hyggelig og hjelpsomt personale. Vil anbefale :)

no.name: Ingvil
no.review: Jeg og kjæresten min likte Tuna-wrapsene veldig godt ❣️ Vi kommer til å kjøpe den igjen 👍 Han er vanligvis kritisk til mat, men likte virkelig denne 💖

no.name: Trine
no.review: Her likte jeg meg veldig godt. Jeg spiste en nydelig varm baguette med tunfisk. Hyggelig betjening og god atmosfære. Kommer gjerne igjen.

no.name: Anna H
no.review: Jeg fikk den beste behandlingen på alle måter! Maten ble servert veldig raskt, og det var en veldig hyggelig atmosfære på stedet.

no.name: Maja
no.review: Personalet er virkelig hyggelig og hjelpsomt, og maten er god.

no.name: Morten
no.review: God mat og kaffe, hyggelig betjening.

no.name: Elida
no.review: Nydelig mat og kjempegod service! Kjøpte min første burrito her i dag, og kommer til å fortsette å kjøpe lunsj her fremover. Veldig fint interiør også :D

no.name: Inger-Marie
no.review: Det var hyggelige ansatte som hilste på alle som kom inn døra. Maten var også veldig god.

no.name: Anna
no.review: Bestilte en mexicansk burrito, det var en god lunsj. Men det beste var den ekstremt søte og snille damen bak disken :) Og vennen min fikk bursdagsmuffins!

no.name: Anders H
no.review: Super liten lokal café. God og skikkelig mat, god kaffe, alle rettigheter. Svært hyggelig betjening og flott service.

no.name: Øyvind
no.review: Et hyggelig sted for lokalmiljøet! Betjeningen er svært hyggelig og gode omgivelser :)

no.name: Kosa
no.review: Herlig sted! Personalet er noen av de mest hjelpsomme og positive menneskene her. Virkelig nydelig mat og store porsjoner til en god pris! Anbefaler å prøve selv.

no.name: Bjarki
no.review: Alltid utrolig hyggelig betjening og fantastisk god mat! Anbefales på det sterkeste!

no.name: Teodor
no.review: Hyggelig og behjelpelig betjening, rask servering og kjempegod burrito. Spiste en takeaway Chicken Tandoori Burrito til lunsj :)

no.name: Jonny
no.review: Alltid god kaffe, latte med godt og tykt melkeskum på toppen🤗 Hyggelig dame som driver stedet 👍

no.name: Hans-Kristian
no.review: Super fint sted. Fantastisk mat og atmosfære. Eieren er veldig pratsom og får meg alltid til å føle meg som en spesiell gjest. Vil absolutt anbefale. Lett 5 stjerner :)

no.name: Zosia
no.review: Super hyggelige ansatte, bra mat og god atmosfære :)

no.name: Stian
no.review: Absolutt den beste wrappen i Oslo. Super smakfull. Eieren er veldig snill og hyggelig. Virkelig et fint lunsjsted.

no.name: Mehmet
no.review: Kjempe god mat, koselig og veldig hyggelige. Må prøves!

no.name: Marie
no.review: Kjempe bra kundeservice, veldig hyggelig å snakke med. Lager så god mat! Anbefaler dette stedet!

no.name: Filip
no.review: Utrolig god mat og en kundeservice uten like! Soheila er en fantastisk dame som kan mat.

no.name: Hans Petter
no.review: Hyggelig sted og meget hyggelig betjening og god mat og godt drikke. Anbefales 😛

no.name: Ole
no.review: Flott plass, god mat og hyggelig betjening!😊 Anbefales

no.name: Inger H.
no.review: Fantastisk sted! Nydelig mat og super service.

no.name: Valentina
no.review: Sebastian er den beste! Han lager fantastisk mat. Anbefaler!

no.name: Carine
no.review: Kjempe god mat, trivelig lokale og eieren er utrolig hyggelig! 😊

no.name: Nicolai
no.review: Meget gode burritoer til en rimelig penge!🤩 Perfekt lunsj!

no.name: Dominika
no.review: Godt mat! Veldig hyggelig betjening! Anbefales ❤️

no.name: Shamy
no.review: Nydelig mat, absolutt å anbefale!! Og veldig hyggelig betjening

no.name: Mateusz
no.review: Julia lager den beste mexicanske burritoen, 11/10!

no.name: Дмитрий
no.review: Hyggelig personale, koselig atmosfære, rolig og fredelig – et godt sted å møte en venn for kaffe og slappe av. God kaffe og mat. Anbefales!

no.name: Farshad
no.review: Smaksfulle mat og hyggelige folk, anbefales sterkt 😉👍🏼😋👌

no.name: Eva
no.review: Fikk servert nydelig nystekt baguette. Tar en tur snart igjen. 😄

no.name: Huan
no.review: Veldig god burritos og baguetter. Rimelig pris. Anbefales :)

no.name: A.S.
no.review: Veldig gode og ferske wraps, hyggelig betjening. Anbefales!!

no.name: Jørund
no.review: Gode wraps. Hyggelig betjening. Fin plass.

no.name: Marcin
no.review: Den beste wrappen i byen... den smaker veldig godt, koselig atmosfære, fantastisk service – Kasia lager en flott mexicansk burrito.

no.name: Kevin
no.review: Beste wraps i området og den snilleste eieren! Et must-besøk – spiste lunsj her to uker på rad, alltid noe nytt å prøve!

no.name: Alice
no.review: Nydelig mat, god kald øl, hyggelig personale, korte ventetider! Anbefales på det sterkeste!

no.name: Steinar
no.review: Meget hyggelig og moderne café. Hyggelig betjening, gode baguetter.

no.name: N.G.
no.review: Hyggelig personal og koselig café.

no.name: Pentograham
no.review: Fantastisk pizza! Sebastian er den beste

no.name: Maksym
no.review: En av de beste burritoene i Oslo

no.name: Kristian
no.review: Nydelig mat og service 😁

no.name: Peter
no.review: Kjempe god mat og kaffe

no.name: Gina
no.review: Best service, god kaffe og god vin og drikke. ♥️👍

no.name: Telewizor
no.review: Den beste servicen noensinne 😊 personalet veldig hyggelig!!

no.name: Soheila Bakhtyari
no.review: Fantastisk mat og service, vil absolutt anbefale...

no.name: Vetle
no.review: God mat👌🏻

no.name: Mathieu
no.review: Kult sted, virkelig gode wraps.

no.name: Marius
no.review: Fantastisk mat 😁👍

no.name: Kai-Roger
no.review: Sinnsykt gode burritos

no.name: Jan Helge
no.review: God kaffe.

no.name: C.J.
no.review: Fantastisk sted og god drikke, akkurat som maten. Kommer absolutt tilbake for espresso martini!

no.name: Mia
no.review: Perfekt for å slappe av og plukke med seg piknik-smørbrød!

no.name: Chantal
no.review: Veldig god espresso. Fint sted.

en.name: Samira
en.review: Friendly staff, excellent quality. It is highly recommended.

en.name: Alexander
en.review: Good food, large portions, very good service 👌

en.name: MarieogJohn
en.review: We were here for the first time today and tasted the world's best wrap 😍 Delicious food and a cosy place 😀

en.name: Nicklas
en.review: Friendly and good service 👍

en.name: Hans
en.review: Really great food and a fantastically friendly owner! Highly recommended ☀️

en.name: Pål
en.review: Good tasting food and quick delivery

en.name: Wenche
en.review: Absolutely incredible food and fantastic service. Highly recommended 😊

en.name: Farshad
en.review: Tasty and flavorful experience 👍🏼😋 Strongly recommended 👌👌

en.name: Ragnhild
en.review: World's best wraps 👏🏻👏🏻🌸! I'm simply addicted! Fantastic service!

en.name: Filip
en.review: Very good wraps and coffee ☺️

en.name: Ava
en.review: Always good food, coffee and fantastic hospitality 👌🏼🤤

en.name: Soheila
en.review: This was the best wrap, coffee and smoothie I've ever tasted 👍👌🏻

en.name: Asma
en.review: Fantastic food and the world's BEST service 🌟

en.name: Julie
en.review: Very good food and drinks 😍

en.name: Christina
en.review: Clean and nice premises. Super friendly and welcoming staff. Fantastically good food, especially the chicken tandoori wrap 🤤 Highly recommended ❤️

en.name: Benedicte
en.review: Good food and coffee. Friendly service and a nice venue.

en.name: Katrine
en.review: Good wraps! Burritos del cielo!

en.name: Monica
en.review: Good coffee, and absolutely fantastic service. A pleasant start to the day before my course. Recommended!

en.name: Johnny
en.review: Recently discovered this place. Everything we've tried for lunch has been top notch. Had an Italian client with me, and even he praised the pizza. The wraps and tuna salad are also recommended.

en.name: Håvard
en.review: Stopped here on a stroller walk when the little one fell asleep. Delicious fresh wrap made to order, and good smoothie. Seating in both sun and shade, and a small playground nearby for the kids.

en.name: Solmaz
en.review: I had a fantastic experience with a very good burger and excellent service! The burger was juicy, flavorful and perfectly cooked, and the staff were friendly, attentive and welcoming. Recommended!

en.name: Nora
en.review: We enjoyed a very good drink after eating a very good pizza here. The food, service and atmosphere are truly top notch – a calm place with service-minded staff who put the customer first.

en.name: Sima
en.review: Fantastic food and excellent service! 🌟 The food was absolutely delicious – flavorful, fresh and perfectly prepared, and the staff were friendly, helpful and made us feel welcome. Highly recommended! 🍽️✨

en.name: Lil P
en.review: I work right next door and come here when I want a great lunch 😋 Very good burritos and baguettes – the favourite has to be the Tandoori filling 🌯 Always cheerful and friendly staff. Recommended 👍

en.name: Gunhild
en.review: Coming back here! Pleasant atmosphere.

en.name: Erika
en.review: Nice lunch spot, good food, always friendly staff.

en.name: Anders Lindsetmo
en.review: Incredibly good baguettes and unbelievably friendly staff.

en.name: Hege
en.review: Fantastically friendly place with Soheila at the helm. Can't find a more service-minded and friendly lady. Everything on the menu is good, so just try your way through :-)

en.name: Alexander De Luca
en.review: Very good food, large portions, quick and good service.

en.name: Emma
en.review: Absolutely fantastic service – the place was actually closed, but the friendly owner opened up and made wraps for us anyway. Saved our evening! A thousand thanks for fantastic service.

en.name: Roya
en.review: Very nice and pleasant place. Fantastic service, couldn't be better.

en.name: Selda
en.review: Been here twice: ordered a chicken wrap and later a chicken salad. So good, and incredibly friendly people working here. Looking forward to the next lunch break!

en.name: Julia
en.review: Tasty food, fair price, really nice and helpful staff. Would recommend :)

en.name: Ingvil
en.review: My partner and I really liked the tuna wraps ❣️ We'll definitely buy them again 👍 They're usually critical about food, but really liked this one 💖

en.name: Trine
en.review: I really enjoyed myself here. I had a delicious hot baguette with tuna. Friendly staff and good atmosphere. Happy to come back.

en.name: Anna H
en.review: I received the best treatment in every way! The food was served very quickly, and there was a very pleasant atmosphere at the place.

en.name: Maja
en.review: Staff is really friendly and helpful and food is good.

en.name: Morten
en.review: Good food and coffee, friendly staff.

en.name: Elida
en.review: Delicious food and great service! Bought my first burrito here today, and will continue buying lunch here going forward. Very nice interior too :D

en.name: Inger-Marie
en.review: There were friendly staff who greeted everyone who came through the door. The food was also very good.

en.name: Anna
en.review: Ordered a Mexican burrito, it was a good lunch. But the best was the extremely sweet and kind lady behind the counter :) And my friend got birthday muffins!

en.name: Anders H
en.review: Super small local café. Good and proper food, good coffee, all the rights. Very friendly staff and great service.

en.name: Øyvind
en.review: A cosy place for the local community! The staff are very friendly and nice surroundings :)

en.name: Kosa
en.review: Lovely place, the staff are some of the most helpful and positive people here! Really delicious food and big portions for a good price! Recommend trying it yourself.

en.name: Bjarki
en.review: Always incredibly friendly staff and fantastically good food! Highly recommended!

en.name: Teodor
en.review: Friendly and helpful staff, quick service and a really good burrito. Had a takeaway Chicken Tandoori Burrito for lunch :)

en.name: Jonny
en.review: Always good coffee, latte with good and thick milk foam on top 🤗 Friendly lady running the place 👍

en.name: Hans-Kristian
en.review: Super nice place. Great food, and atmosphere. The owner is very chatty, and always makes me feel like a special guest. Would highly recommend. Easy 5 star :)

en.name: Zosia
en.review: Super friendly staff, good food and good atmosphere :)

en.name: Stian
en.review: Absolutely the best wrap in Oslo. Super tasty. The owner is really nice and friendly. Really a nice lunch place.

en.name: Mehmet
en.review: Really good food, cosy and very friendly. Must try!

en.name: Marie
en.review: Great customer service, very pleasant to talk to. Makes such good food! Recommend this place!

en.name: Filip
en.review: Incredibly good food and unparalleled customer service! Soheila is a fantastic lady who knows food.

en.name: Hans Petter
en.review: Nice place and very friendly staff and good food and good drinks. Recommended 😛

en.name: Ole
en.review: Great place, good food and friendly staff! 😊 Recommended

en.name: Inger H.
en.review: Fantastic place! Delicious food and super service.

en.name: Valentina
en.review: Sebastian is the best! He makes fantastic food. Recommended!

en.name: Carine
en.review: Really good food, pleasant venue and the owner is incredibly friendly! 😊

en.name: Nicolai
en.review: Very good burritos for a reasonable price! 🤩 Perfect lunch!

en.name: Dominika
en.review: Good food! Very friendly staff! Recommended ❤️

en.name: Shamy
en.review: Delicious food, absolutely recommended!! And very friendly staff

en.name: Mateusz
en.review: Julia makes the best Mexican burrito, 11/10!

en.name: Дмитрий
en.review: Nice staff, cozy atmosphere, quiet and peaceful – a good place to meet a friend for coffee and relax. Good coffee and food. Recommended!

en.name: Farshad
en.review: Flavorful food and friendly people, highly recommended 😉👍🏼😋👌

en.name: Eva
en.review: Was served a delicious freshly baked baguette. Will stop by again soon. 😄

en.name: Huan
en.review: Very good burritos and baguettes. Reasonable price. Recommended :)

en.name: A.S.
en.review: Very good and fresh wraps, friendly staff. Recommended!!

en.name: Jørund
en.review: Good wraps. Friendly staff. Nice place.

en.name: Marcin
en.review: The best wrap in the city... it tastes very good, nice atmosphere, great service – Kasia makes a great Mexican burrito.

en.name: Kevin
en.review: Best wraps around and nicest owner! Must-try place – had lunch for two weeks straight, always something new to try!

en.name: Alice
en.review: Delicious food, good cold beer, friendly staff, short waiting times! Highly recommended!

en.name: Steinar
en.review: Very friendly and modern café. Friendly staff, good baguettes.

en.name: N.G.
en.review: Friendly staff and cosy café.

en.name: Pentograham
en.review: Fantastic pizza! Sebastian is the best

en.name: Maksym
en.review: One of the best burritos in Oslo

en.name: Kristian
en.review: Delicious food and service 😁

en.name: Peter
en.review: Really good food and coffee

en.name: Gina
en.review: Best service, good coffee and good wine and drinks. ♥️👍

en.name: Telewizor
en.review: The best service ever 😊 staff very friendly!!

en.name: Soheila Bakhtyari
en.review: Great food and service, would highly recommend...

en.name: Vetle
en.review: Good food 👌🏻

en.name: Mathieu
en.review: Cool place, really good wraps.

en.name: Marius
en.review: Fantastic food 😁👍

en.name: Kai-Roger
en.review: Incredibly good burritos

en.name: Jan Helge
en.review: Good coffee.

en.name: C.J.
en.review: Fantastic place and good drinks, same as the food. For sure coming back for espresso martini!

en.review: Perfect for relaxing and picking up picnic sandwiches!

en.review: Very good espresso. Nice place.
